hero_headline: The ecosystem platform for sports technology in Africa
hero_subheadline: Connecting African and International innovation markets. Regulatory intelligence, market insight, and industry membership.
what_we_do_heading: Three ways we serve the African sports tech ecosystem
card1_body: Connecting international sports tech companies with African markets - introductions, partnerships, and distribution across South Africa and the broader continent.
card2_body: Acting as your registered POPIA representative in South Africa - handling regulatory correspondence, maintaining compliance documentation, and keeping you informed of changes.
card3_body: African sports tech market research, company directories, and sector analysis for members, partners, and investors navigating the continent.
services_card1_body: If your company collects or processes data from South African users, POPIA requires a local representative. AfricanSTN provides registered representation - enquire for details on what is covered.
services_card2_body: Register to receive AfricanSTN's newsletter and sector intelligence reports. Register your interest in directory inclusion - AfricanSTN curates the directory and will be in touch.
cta_heading: Join the African sports technology ecosystem
cta_body: Whether you are an international sports tech company entering Africa, an African venture looking for visibility, or an organisation that needs POPIA compliance support - AfricanSTN is your starting point.
